description: Machine-readable dependency direction contract from GODELOS_REPO_IMPLEMENTATION_CHARTER §6.

layer_descriptions.interface: External API surface, protocol handling, presentation
layer_descriptions.knowledge: Knowledge substrate, persistent store adapters, semantic memory
layer_descriptions.core: Core cognitive processing, state management, operator logic
layer_descriptions.runtime: Process orchestration, scheduling, lifecycle, messaging, runtime state

allowed_direction: interface → agents → knowledge → core → runtime (dependencies flow inward)
hard_prohibitions: interface importing deep internal concrete storage implementations directly
knowledge adapters importing runtime orchestration logic
agent modules reaching through interface modules to access runtime internals
circular imports between backend/core and backend/runtime
circular imports between godelOS/core_kr interface and concrete store implementations

circular_import_policy.stance: Any import cycle is presumed architectural debt
circular_import_policy.forbidden: Never patch cycles by adding local imports inside functions unless explicitly temporary, commented as debt, and tracked for removal

ownership_hints.backend/runtime/: Runtime Kernel — process orchestration, scheduling, lifecycle
ownership_hints.backend/core/: Core Cognitive Engine — reasoning, state update, operator logic
ownership_hints.godelOS/core_kr/: Knowledge Substrate — persistent knowledge, semantic storage
ownership_hints.backend/agents/: Agent Framework — agent lifecycle, message routing, boundary enforcement
